name: alspitz_esc_test_repo
note: MIT-licensed motor/prop/ESC characterization project with RCBenchmark and AutoQuad logs.

name: alspitz_esc_test_format_mapping
note: Maps RCBenchmark column 12 to RPM and converts thrust from gf to newtons.

name: alspitz_esc_test_sample_tests
note: Defines six sample tests, all using DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch propeller.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench_repo
note: Open FPV prop-bench application with load-cell, Betaflight FC, ESC telemetry, automated tests, and CSV export.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench_renderer
note: Renderer code exposes test timings, motor-throttle commands, and telemetry CSV row fields.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench_msp_parser
note: MSP parser records per-motor rpm, temperature, voltage, current, and consumption telemetry.

name: vayu_esc_studio_repo
note: Apache-2.0 AM32 ESC configurator and thrust-test-bench project with telemetry, safety limits, and reports.

name: vayu_esc_studio_csv_export
note: CSV exporter defines telemetry, thrust-test, result-summary, ESC-config, and torque-test schemas.

name: vayu_esc_studio_test_types
note: Test-type service defines auto-ramp, endurance, step-response, thermal, throttle-sweep, and hold-thrust protocols.

name: esc32v3-f40
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.
command_protocol: manual duty-cycle steps of 5 from AutoQuadECU

name: kotleta-f60-duty
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.

name: kotleta-f60-rpm
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.
command_protocol: closed-loop RPM steps of 500 rpm from 2500 to 13500 rpm

name: esc32v3-f60
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.
command_protocol: AutoQuad ECU duty-cycle steps from 15 to 100 by 5

name: esc32v2-f60
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.
command_protocol: CLI duty-cycle steps from 10 to 100 by 5

name: aikon-f80
note: All alspitz sample tests use a DALPROP T7056 three-blade 7-inch prop and 16 V power supply.
command_protocol: RCBenchmark PWM steps from 1050 to 1950 us

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Max-thrust test ramps throttle 1000->2000.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Max-thrust test holds full throttle.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Max-thrust test ramps down after each run.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Max-thrust test waits between runs.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Max-thrust and acceleration tests average three runs.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Acceleration test ramps throttle 1000->2000 over this window.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Acceleration test watches RPM/thrust until max stabilizes.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Main process polls analog and motor telemetry at 200 ms.

name: fpv_geek_prop_bench
note: Renderer converts MSP rpm with rpm/(41*polePairs).

name: method_notes
note: Downloads public raw logs, converts thrust gf to newtons, fits T=k*omega^2 and Q/T through origin, bins static operating points by 500 rpm, and estimates observed 50/100 ms RPM slew from measured traces. It does not claim direct command-lag for RCBenchmark-only logs because command timestamps are absent. It also does not fill yaw/Q-over-T calibration from this source because the high-RPM torque fields are empty.
